Input Prefixed

Text input with a prefix addon (left-side element) using <lyte-input> Slyte DOM with a custom prefix wrapper. Supports text, icon, and dropdown prefixes.

Form Figma Synced 3 Variants × 3 Sizes
Text Prefix — Left-side text addon
URL prefix
https://
Currency prefix
$
Phone prefix
+1
HTML
<!-- Input with Text Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Enter URL" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Currency Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">$</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Amount" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Phone Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">+1</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Phone number" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-affixed {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

.zc-input-prefix {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 12px;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F8F8F9);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
Icon Prefix — Left-side icon addon
Email icon
User icon
Lock icon
HTML
<!-- Input with Icon Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Email address" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- User Icon Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Username" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Lock Icon Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-lock"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Password" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-prefix-icon {
  padding: 0 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.zc-input-prefix-icon:hover {
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
}
Dropdown Prefix — Left-side dropdown addon
Country code
Protocol selector
Currency selector
HTML
<!-- Input with Dropdown Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>+1</option>
            <option>+44</option>
            <option>+91</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Phone number" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Protocol Selector Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>https://</option>
            <option>http://</option>
            <option>ftp://</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Domain name" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Currency Selector Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select">
            <option>USD</option>
            <option>EUR</option>
            <option>GBP</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Amount" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-prefix-dropdown {
  padding: 0;
}

.zc-input-prefix-select {
  height: 100%;
  padding: 0 8px 0 12px;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
  cursor: pointer;
  outline: none;
}
States — Focus, Filled, Error, Success
Default
https://
Focus
https://
Filled
https://
Error
https://
Success
https://
HTML
<!-- Default -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Default state" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Focus -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-focus">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Focused input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Error -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-error">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Invalid URL" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Success -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-success">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Valid URL" lt-prop-value="mysite.com" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
/* Focus */
.zc-input-affixed-focus,
.zc-input-affixed:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05),
              0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}

/* Error */
.zc-input-affixed-error {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

.zc-input-affixed-error .zc-input-prefix {
  border-right-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}

/* Success */
.zc-input-affixed-success {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}

.zc-input-affixed-success .zc-input-prefix {
  border-right-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
Sizes — SM, MD (Base), LG
SM (28px)
https://
MD — Base (36px)
https://
LG (44px)
https://
HTML
<!-- Small (SM) -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-sm">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Small input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Medium / Base (MD) — default, no size class needed -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Medium input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Large (LG) -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-lg">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Large input" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
/* SM — 28px height */
.zc-input-affixed-sm {
  height: 28px;
}
.zc-input-affixed-sm .zc-input-prefix {
  padding: 0 8px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
}

/* MD — 36px (default, no class needed) */

/* LG — 44px height */
.zc-input-affixed-lg {
  height: 44px;
}
.zc-input-affixed-lg .zc-input-prefix {
  padding: 0 16px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Text prefix disabled
https://
Icon prefix disabled
Dropdown prefix disabled
HTML
<!-- Disabled Text Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix">https://</span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Icon Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-icon"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>

<!-- Disabled Dropdown Prefix -->
<div class="zc-input-affixed zc-input-prefixed zc-input-affixed-disabled">
    <span class="zc-input-prefix zc-input-prefix-dropdown">
        <select class="zc-input-prefix-select" disabled>
            <option>+1</option>
            <option>+44</option>
        </select>
    </span>
    <lyte-input lt-prop-placeholder="Disabled" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-input"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-input-affixed-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-prefix {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
}

.zc-input-affixed-disabled .zc-input-prefix-select {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
